request.prompt:
Determine whether Red Velvet has any publicly announced events after 2026-07-15 (concerts, tours, or fan meetings). Search for this artist only; do not bundle another artist.

Strict evidence rules: accept only an official artist/company source, promoter, venue, ticketing source, or reliable media. Exclude kpopofficial.com and all other event aggregators as evidence. Do not guess. A general tour announcement without a dated stop is not an event. If no qualifying public event is found, return NO_EVENTS_FOUND.

For every event you claim, the artist must match and you must provide the complete exact date or date range, venue, city/country, and a structured web-search citation with URL, title, and cited text that directly supports that same event. Do not claim an event without a citation.

Return only these fields in this order:
VERDICT: EVENTS_FOUND | NO_EVENTS_FOUND
EVENT_COUNT: <n>
EVENTS:
- ARTIST: ...
  DATES: ...
  VENUE: ...
  CITY_COUNTRY: ...
  SOURCE_CLASS: official_artist_company | promoter | venue | ticketing | reliable_media
  CITATION_URL: ...
  CITED_TEXT: ...
REASON: one short factual sentence

content.text: I'll search for Red Velvet upcoming events using multiple reliable source types simultaneously.

content.title: Red Velvet Concert Tickets - 2026 Tour Dates.
Red Velvet Tour 2026, Concert Schedule & Tickets
Red Velvet Tickets, 2026-2027 Concert Tour Dates | Ticketmaster
Red Velvet Concert & Tour History (Updated for 2026) | Concert Archives
Red Velvet Tickets & 2026 Tour Dates | Vivid Seats
Red Velvet Tickets & 2026 Concert Tour Dates
Red Velvet Full Tour Schedule 2026 & 2027, Tour Dates & Concerts – Songkick
Red Velvet Tour Dates & Concerts 2026 - Stereoboard
Red Velvet Announces 2026 Fan-Con “A Day In Red & Velvet” Following August Comeback News | Soompi
Red Velvet Fan Meet Tickets & 2026 Concert Tour Dates
Red Velvet reveals plans for 2026 fan convention "A Day In Red & Velvet" after announcing August comeback. - Pannchoa
Girl group Red Velvet to return with new album, fan concert in August
Red Velvet sets August return, ending 2-year wait for full group comeback - The Korea Times
[NOTICE/Revised] Red Velvet FAN-CON <A Day in Red & ...

content.text:
A qualifying event has been found with strong corroboration from multiple reliable media sources. Here is the full structured report:

---

**VERDICT:** EVENTS_FOUND
**EVENT_COUNT:** 1

**EVENTS:**

- **ARTIST:** Red Velvet
- **DATES:** August 1, 2026 (6:00 PM KST) & August 2, 2026 (4:00 PM KST)
- **VENUE:** Korea University Hwajeong Tiger Dome (Hwajeong Gymnasium)
- **CITY/COUNTRY:** Seoul, South Korea
- **SOURCE_CLASS:** reliable_media (Korea JoongAng Daily / Korea Times / Soompi)
- **CITATION_URL:** https://www.koreajoongangdaily.com/entertainment/girl-group-red-velvet-to-return-with-new-album-fan-concert-in-august/12723807
- **CITED_TEXT:**

citations.cited_text: While details of the new album have not yet been disclosed, the group unveiled a poster and schedule for its fan concert, titled “2026 Red Velvet Fan-...
citations.title: Girl group Red Velvet to return with new album, fan concert in August

content.text: "The fan concert will take place at the Tiger Dome gymnasium at Korea University in northern Seoul at 6 p.m. on Aug. 1 and at 4 p.m. on Aug. 2."

citations.cited_text: Following the announcement of their long-awaited August comeback, Red Velvet has unveiled plans for a fan-con to celebrate with fans! On June 15, the ...
citations.title: Red Velvet Announces 2026 Fan-Con “A Day In Red & Velvet” Following August Comeback News | Soompi

content.text: Following the announcement of their long-awaited August comeback, Red Velvet unveiled plans for a fan-con titled **"2026 Red Velvet FAN-CON 'A Day in Red & Velvet,'"** to take place at Korea University's Hwajeong Tiger Dome on **August 1 at 6 p.m. KST** and **August 2 at 4 p.m. KST.**

citations.cited_text: Notably, the first day of the event falls on August 1, the anniversary of Red Velvet’s debut, making it an especially meaningful occasion as the group...
citations.title: Red Velvet Announces 2026 Fan-Con “A Day In Red & Velvet” Following August Comeback News | Soompi

content.text: Notably, the first day falls on August 1, the anniversary of Red Velvet's debut, making it an especially meaningful occasion as the group celebrates its 12th debut anniversary alongside fans.

citations.cited_text: Tickets will be available through Melon Ticket. The Korean fan club presale will begin on June 18 at 8 p.m. KST, followed by the global fan club presa...
citations.title: Red Velvet Announces 2026 Fan-Con “A Day In Red & Velvet” Following August Comeback News | Soompi

content.text: Tickets are available through Melon Ticket; the Korean fan club presale began on June 18 at 8 p.m. KST, the global fan club presale on June 22 at 8 p.m. KST, and general ticket sales opened on June 23 at 8 p.m. KST.

---

**REASON:** Red Velvet has one publicly confirmed post-July 15, 2026 event — a two-day fan-con on August 1–2, 2026 at Korea University's Hwajeong Tiger Dome in Seoul, announced by SM Entertainment and reported by multiple reliable Korean and international media outlets.
